mainEntity.name: What size companies benefit from Virtual CFO in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies with turnover between Rs 1 crore and Rs 100 crores benefit most. Below Rs 1 crore, basic accounting may suffice. Above Rs 100 crores, a full-time CFO may be warranted. Virtual CFO bridges the gap with CFO-level expertise at SME-friendly pricing.

mainEntity.name: Can Virtual CFO handle banking and lender relationships?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We manage bank covenant compliance, prepare stock statements and QIS/MSOD reports, coordinate with bank auditors, and handle working capital limit renewals. We also support new banking facility applications with projections and documentation.

mainEntity.name: Is there a lock-in period for Virtual CFO engagement?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Our Virtual CFO service runs month-on-month with no lock-in. We recommend a minimum 3-month engagement for meaningful results, but there is no contractual commitment beyond each month.
